description.value:
Chirurgeon

The Chirurgeon is a healer and physician, trained in the medical arts necessary to keep a warband alive and functioning in the face of the Imperium's countless horrors. Whether they learned their craft in a scholam, on the battlefield, or through forbidden experimentation, the Chirurgeon combines medical knowledge with physical resilience and an intimate understanding of the human body — both how to heal it and how to harm it.

Role Aptitudes

Fieldcraft, Intelligence, Knowledge, Strength, Toughness

Role Talent

Resistance (Poisons) or Takedown

Role Skill

Medicae

Role Bonus

Dedicated Healer: In addition to the normal uses of Fate Points, when a Chirurgeon character fails a Medicae Test, they may spend a Fate Point to automatically succeed instead with the same number of Degrees of Success as Degrees of Failure on the original Test.

specialAbilities.name: Dedicated Healer
specialAbilities.description: In addition to the normal uses of Fate Points, when a Chirurgeon character fails a Medicae Test, they may spend a Fate Point to automatically succeed instead with the same number of Degrees of Success as Degrees of Failure on the original Test.
